_comment: Ancient God Guardian Beast — Renegade Immortal. A beast from the Land of the Ancient God. Canon: guards the Tu Si inheritance area. Extremely dangerous.
name: Ancient God Guardian Beast

canonical.appearance: A towering beast with Ancient God lineage — obsidian-black hide inscribed with glowing restriction patterns. Multiple eyes. Immense presence pressure (divine sense reacts).
canonical.behavior: Patrols the Ancient God inheritance grounds. Attacks any intruder regardless of cultivation level. Cannot be reasoned with. Restrictions embedded in its body.
canonical.habitat: Land of the Ancient God, Restriction Mountain approaches
canonical.cultivation: Soul Formation to Soul Transformation equivalent
canonical.intelligence: 6-8 (near-human — can assess cultivator realm and adjust tactics)
canonical.diet: Spiritual energy, Ancient God residual power from the land
canonical.relationships: Created by Tu Si to guard the inheritance. Answers to no one else. Recognizes Ancient God bloodline holders.
techniques: Restriction pulse (AoE that slows and damages)
Ancient God roar (fear effect, disables abilities for 3s)
mutations: Restriction Body — 30% melee damage reflection, immune to restriction-based attacks
canonical.ecology: Apex guardian — top of the food chain in the Ancient God domain. No natural predators. Only defeated by inheritance seekers who pass the Restriction Mountain trials.

art_direction.model_notes: Massive beast with glowing restriction patterns on hide. Multiple glowing eyes. Presence particle effect (pressure aura).
art_direction.texture_notes: Obsidian-black hide with glowing blue-red restriction inscriptions. Multiple eye slits that glow crimson.
